prompt: Write `tree_struct_str(node)` serializing a nested-tuple tree (leaf=int, branch=(left,right)) to a lisp-style string: a leaf is str(value), a branch is "("+left+" "+right+")". Verify with assertions and end with print('PASS'): tree_struct_str((1,(2,3))) == "(1 (2 3))"; tree_struct_str(5) == "5"; tree_struct_str(((1,2),3)) == "((1 2) 3)".

Write `tree_struct_tokens(node)` serializing a nested-tuple tree to a flat list of string tokens in preorder: a leaf yields [str(value)], a branch yields ["("] + left_tokens + right_tokens + [")"]. Verify with assertions and end with print('PASS'): tree_struct_tokens((1,(2,3))) == ["(","1","(","2","3",")",")"]; tree_struct_tokens(5) == ["5"]; tree_struct_tokens((1,2)) == ["(","1","2",")"].

Write `tree_struct_list(node)` serializing a nested-tuple tree to the same structure with tuples replaced by lists (leaves unchanged). Verify with assertions and end with print('PASS'): tree_struct_list((1,(2,3))) == [1,[2,3]]; tree_struct_list(5) == 5; tree_struct_list(((1,2),3)) == [[1,2],3].

Write `tree_struct_json(node)` serializing a nested-tuple tree to nested dicts: a leaf becomes {"leaf": value}, a branch becomes {"branch": [left, right]}. Verify with assertions and end with print('PASS'): tree_struct_json((1,2)) == {"branch": [{"leaf": 1}, {"leaf": 2}]}; tree_struct_json(5) == {"leaf": 5}; tree_struct_json((1,(2,3))) == {"branch": [{"leaf": 1}, {"branch": [{"leaf": 2}, {"leaf": 3}]}]}.

Write `tree_leafvals_csv(node)` returning the preorder leaf values as a comma-separated string. Verify with assertions and end with print('PASS'): tree_leafvals_csv((1,(2,3))) == "1,2,3"; tree_leafvals_csv(5) == "5"; tree_leafvals_csv(((1,2),3)) == "1,2,3".

Write `tree_leafvals_tokens(node)` returning the preorder leaf values as a list of strings. Verify with assertions and end with print('PASS'): tree_leafvals_tokens((1,(2,3))) == ["1","2","3"]; tree_leafvals_tokens(5) == ["5"]; tree_leafvals_tokens((1,2)) == ["1","2"].

Write `tree_leafvals_list(node)` returning the preorder leaf values as a flat list of ints. Verify with assertions and end with print('PASS'): tree_leafvals_list((1,(2,3))) == [1,2,3]; tree_leafvals_list(5) == [5]; tree_leafvals_list(((1,2),3)) == [1,2,3].

Write `tree_leafvals_json(node)` returning {"leaves": [preorder leaf values]}. Verify with assertions and end with print('PASS'): tree_leafvals_json((1,(2,3))) == {"leaves": [1,2,3]}; tree_leafvals_json(5) == {"leaves": [5]}; tree_leafvals_json((1,2)) == {"leaves": [1,2]}.

Write `tree_lvldepth_csv(node)` returning preorder leaves as "value:depth" pairs joined by commas (root depth 0). Verify with assertions and end with print('PASS'): tree_lvldepth_csv((1,(2,3))) == "1:1,2:2,3:2"; tree_lvldepth_csv(5) == "5:0"; tree_lvldepth_csv((1,2)) == "1:1,2:1".

Write `tree_lvldepth_tokens(node)` returning preorder leaves as a list of "value:depth" strings (root depth 0). Verify with assertions and end with print('PASS'): tree_lvldepth_tokens((1,(2,3))) == ["1:1","2:2","3:2"]; tree_lvldepth_tokens(5) == ["5:0"]; tree_lvldepth_tokens((1,2)) == ["1:1","2:1"].

Write `tree_lvldepth_list(node)` returning preorder leaves as a list of [value, depth] pairs (root depth 0). Verify with assertions and end with print('PASS'): tree_lvldepth_list((1,(2,3))) == [[1,1],[2,2],[3,2]]; tree_lvldepth_list(5) == [[5,0]]; tree_lvldepth_list((1,2)) == [[1,1],[2,1]].

Write `tree_lvldepth_json(node)` returning preorder leaves as a list of {"v": value, "d": depth} dicts (root depth 0). Verify with assertions and end with print('PASS'): tree_lvldepth_json((1,2)) == [{"v":1,"d":1},{"v":2,"d":1}]; tree_lvldepth_json(5) == [{"v":5,"d":0}]; tree_lvldepth_json((1,(2,3))) == [{"v":1,"d":1},{"v":2,"d":2},{"v":3,"d":2}].
